themes.title: Performance Monitoring
themes.description: Enhancing performance monitoring capabilities to ensure optimal application performance.

themes.title: User Engagement
themes.description: Improving user engagement through feedback mechanisms and status updates.

themes.title: Documentation and Benchmarking
themes.description: Providing comprehensive documentation and benchmarking for performance metrics.

milestones.name: MVP Development
milestones.description: Initial development phase focusing on critical performance monitoring features.
milestones.success_criteria: Complete implementation of Error Rate Monitoring and Performance Monitoring Alerts.

milestones.name: V1 Development
milestones.description: Development phase focusing on critical fixes and enhancements.
milestones.success_criteria: Fix WebSocket Memory Leak and ensure system stability.

milestones.name: V2 Development
milestones.description: Enhancements and new features for user engagement and performance monitoring.
milestones.success_criteria: Launch Customer Status Page and implement performance monitoring metrics.

sequencing.reason: V1 Development requires the completion of MVP Development to ensure foundational features are in place.
V2 Development builds on the improvements made in V1, particularly the fixes and enhancements.

v1.goal: Implement critical fixes and enhancements to improve performance.

v2.goal: Enhance user engagement and performance monitoring capabilities.
